history.content: Done — proposal execution is complete and verified. ### What was completed - Implemented deterministic routing so **BOOT.md startup summaries** always go to a **new, unread automated chat session**. - Implemented the same guaranteed fresh-session behavior for **hot-restart completion output**. - Added/updated frontend handling for `session_notification` so **automated sessions are surfaced and marked unread**, even when another chat is currently active. - Removed the duplicate cron/task fallback in **TasksPage `task_complete` handling** that could create duplicate auto-sessions/races. - Preserved backward compatibility by keeping legacy payload fields while using the newer automated-session payload as canonical behavior. ### Verification - Ran build/compile successfully: `npm run build` → `tsc` exit code **0**. - Behavioral result now matches expected outcome: - Boot and hot-restart outputs route into guaranteed fresh auto sessions. - Notifications for automated sessions are visible and unread-state is correct. - Duplicate fallback session creation path is removed.
